title: Darkest Dungeon receives a surprising DLC with classes from its sequel after six years
summary: The acclaimed horror RPG celebrates its tenth anniversary with new downloadable content arriving in August.

title: Splatoon Raiders now available with positive reviews for its single-player and multiplayer modes
summary: The Splatoon spin-off, focused on the salmonids, receives excellent reviews and a launch trailer.

title: Nintendo refuses to refund Switch 2 tariffs and asks to dismiss class-action lawsuit
summary: The company defends its pricing policy amid consumer complaints over tariffs imposed in the US.

title: Hasbro suffers a $56 million hole due to cancellation of several video games
summary: Despite the losses, the company continues to bet on Baldur's Gate 3 as a pillar of its future in the video game industry.

title: The Witcher 3 expansion 'Songs of the Past' to be presented at Gamescom 2026
summary: CD Projekt Red confirmed August as the date to reveal the new downloadable content for the acclaimed RPG.

title: PlayStation physical sales plummet, only seven games exceed 100,000 copies in the US
summary: Sales data and developer statements confirm the unstoppable trend towards digital format in the industry.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces late July games with Halo: Campaign Evolved leading the way
summary: Microsoft's subscription renews its catalog with new additions and confirms departures from the service for the coming weeks.

title: Ubisoft confirms news of Ghost Recon Wildlands after a Reddit leak
summary: The definitive edition for PS5 and Xbox Series X|S of the open-world game seems imminent, according to rumors.

title: Wreckreation 2 announced, the sequel to the spiritual successor of Burnout
summary: The newly formed studio by the series creator works on a new arcade racing installment.

title: Forza Horizon 5 director says Game Pass doesn't have enough subscribers to be viable
summary: Mike Brown reflects on Xbox's business model, linking its failure to mass layoffs in the industry.

title: Xbox Game Pass arrives on Meta Horizon+ virtual reality glasses
summary: Microsoft expands its subscription service to a new ecosystem, bringing basic editions of games to mixed reality.

title: A mod adds loading-free takeoffs to Starfield three years after its release
summary: Inspired by No Man's Sky, the mod allows traveling from the surface to outer space without loading screens.

title: Marathon debuts its PvE cooperative mode and triples its daily player count
summary: Bungie's shooter receives a major update with the Vault Breaker mode.

title: Palworld players create infinite bombs thanks to selective breeding system
summary: The community discovers new combat strategies while the game adds an armor transfiguration system.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 announces open and closed beta dates
summary: The beta will include a test on Switch 2 and kick off Activision's testing season.

title: 1047 Games lays off more employees just one month after Empulse launch
summary: The Splitgate studio continues with staff cuts following the disappointing debut of its new game.

title: Unity demonstrates a Unreal Engine character running on its graphics engine for the first time
summary: The company presents its new engine with a careful stance on generative artificial intelligence.

title: Nvidia reveals DLSS 5 controls, allowing adjustment of AI filter with two sliders
summary: The new upscaling technology will give developers greater control over the final look of the game.

title: Disney conducts massive layoffs at Pixar despite box office success of Toy Story 5 and Hoppers
summary: Hundreds of employees are laid off at the animation studio in a new round of cuts at the company.

title: Studios closed by Xbox find a second chance, like Tango Gameworks and Alpha Dog
summary: The founders of Alpha Dog Games reacquire the studio while the creator of Hi-Fi Rush manages to save his project.

title: Fans theorize about Robert Downey Jr.'s role as Doctor Doom in Avengers: Doomsday
summary: The trailer for the next Marvel movie generates all kinds of speculation among the community.

title: Nintendo practically confirms development of Splatoon 4
summary: The company suggests that the next installment of the shooter saga is on its way for future platforms.

title: DC Comics announces a new fighting game called DCKO that baffles fans
summary: The peculiar name of the title generates surprise and memes on social media after its official presentation.

title: Christopher Nolan's Odyssey divides critics between box office success and criticism of cinematic language
summary: The historical epic provokes divided reactions, from accusations of 'insult' to praise for its cultural impact.

title: Xbox's new vice president of engineering resigns two months after taking office
summary: The sudden departure adds to the internal turmoil in Microsoft's video game division.
